ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist who performed the track */,
  "album_id" TEXT /* ID of the album the track belongs to */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the track */,
  "track_uri" TEXT /* Unique URI for the track */,
  "track_href" TEXT /* URL to the track's metadata */,
  "analysis_url" TEXT /* URL to the track's audio analysis */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the track contains explicit content */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number within the album */,
  "disc_number" INTEGER /* Disc number if the album has multiple discs */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the track */,
  "isrc" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code for the track */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre_id" TEXT /* ID of the genre the artist is associated with */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the artist */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has */,
  "artist_uri" TEXT /* Unique URI for the artist */,
  "artist_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's image */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the artist is from */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the artist */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* URLs to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label the artist is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "album_uri" TEXT /* Unique URI for the album */,
  "album_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the album's image */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label of the album */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the album contains explicit content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Measure of how suitable a track is for dancing */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy level of the track */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the track (0-11, where 0=C, 1=C#/Db, etc.) */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Overall loudness of the track in decibels */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track (0 for minor, 1 for major) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Fraction of the track that consists of spoken words */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Confidence that the track is acoustic */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Confidence that the track has no vocal content */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Confidence that the track was recorded in a live setting */,
  "valence" REAL /* Measure of musical positiveness conveyed by a track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* BPM of the track */,
  "duration_confidence" REAL /* Confidence in the duration of the track */,
  "key_confidence" REAL /* Confidence in the key of the track */,
  "mode_confidence" REAL /* Confidence in the mode of the track */,
  "time_signature_confidence" REAL /* Confidence in the time signature of the track */,
  "tuning" REAL /* Tuning of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" TEXT /* ID of the parent genre if the genre is a sub-genre */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track played */,
  "play_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was played */,
  "play_duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the play session in milliseconds */,
  "skipped" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the track was skipped */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to play the track */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location when playing the track */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the track has been played by the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* User rating for the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., free, premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_genres" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "genre_id" TEXT /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_genres" (
  "album_id" TEXT /* ID of the album */,
  "genre_id" TEXT /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_genres" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "genre_id" TEXT /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "genre_id")
)
